title: Reactive Music
description: Refactors Minecraft's music to be dynamic and reactive, including new fantasy and celtic tracks to give an air of adventure.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jwvqhKYaUWQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


```
In ancient woods, whispers of magic danced with the wind, weaving tales of a timeless realm.
```

Reactive Music trades Minecraft's default music for something dynamic, reactive, and ever-changing. Including a collection of fantasy and celtic tracks to give an air of wonder, a whisper of the unknown, and the call of _adventure_.

Reactive Music is based off a music pack I originally made for the Ambience mod back in 1.12. Now rebuilt to be a standalone mod for modern minecraft.

**Reactive Music requires [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)!**

---

### A Note on Updated Versions
Currently not planned to support versions 26.1 and greater until Mojang stops bloating the game with features with an inch of depth. (yes i'm petty) 

I do this in my free time and don't really make any money from it, and I don't really want to update mods for a game for which I have zero interest in the direction it's being taken.




## Custom Songpacks

We have an active songpack creation community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/vJ6BCjPR3R) in the `#songpack-releases` channel! While not officially endorsed by me, people have created all sorts of awesome musical packs you can try out!

![discord songpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb54d417471c26a12766cc9ca264fbd8265dedd7.png)

## Creating Songpacks

You can also make your own songpacks! You can find a full guide [here](https://github.com/CircuitLord/ReactiveMusic/blob/master/docs/MAKING_SONGPACKS.md) or watch the video below!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YvEap8IUS-c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
